query:
-- 查询partners表中的重庆加盟商
SELECT * FROM partners WHERE id = 17;

-- 查询是否有关联的用户
SELECT u.* FROM users u
JOIN partners p ON p.userId = u.id
WHERE p.id = 17;

-- 查询所有合伙人及其关联用户
SELECT 
  p.id as partnerId,
  p.name as partnerName,
  p.phone as partnerPhone,
  p.userId,
  u.name as userName,
  u.phone as userPhone,
  u.isActive as userActive
FROM partners p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.userId = u.id
WHERE p.name LIKE '%重庆%'
ORDER BY p.id;
